---
title: "Weekly Schedule" 
description: "syllabus de MAD213"
date: 2020-10-06T21:13:14-05:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
---


```{r , echo=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
text_tbl <- data.frame(
Date=c("October 7","October 9","October 14","October 15","October 21","October 22","October 28","October 29","November 4","November 5","November 11","November 12","November 18"),
Topic=c("Introduction", "Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation", "Mining Method Selection", "Ground Mechanics", "Supports", "Drilling", "Underground Development", "Explosives and blasting", "Underground Extraction", "Transportation – Haulage And Hoisting", "Sustainable Development", "Planning for mine closure","Midterm 1")
)

kbl(text_tbl,escape = F) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)%>%
  column_spec(1, width = "8em")

```
